Name: FGPUSpriteEmitterInfo
Description: The data needed by the runtime to simulate sprites.

Variables.Name: RequiredModule
Variables.Description: The required module. Needed for now, but should be divorced from the runtime.

Variables.Name: SpawnModule
Variables.Description: The spawn module. Needed for now, but should be divorced from the runtime.

Variables.Name: SpawnPerUnitModule
Variables.Description: The spawn-per-unit module.

Variables.Name: SpawnModules
Variables.Description: List of spawn modules that must be evaluated at runtime.

Variables.Name: LocalVectorField
Variables.Description: Local vector field info.

Variables.Name: VectorFieldScale
Variables.Description: Per-particle vector field scale.

Variables.Name: DragCoefficient
Variables.Description: Per-particle drag coefficient.

Variables.Name: PointAttractorStrength
Variables.Description: Point attractor strength over time.

Variables.Name: Resilience
Variables.Description: Damping factor applied to particle collisions.

Variables.Name: ConstantAcceleration
Variables.Description: Constant acceleration to apply to particles.

Variables.Name: PointAttractorPosition
Variables.Description: Point attractor position.

Variables.Name: PointAttractorRadiusSq
Variables.Description: Point attractor radius, squared.

Variables.Name: OrbitOffsetBase
Variables.Description: Amount by which to offset particles when they are spawned.

Variables.Name: InvMaxSize
Variables.Description: One over the maximum size of a sprite particle.

Variables.Name: InvRotationRateScale
Variables.Description: The inverse scale to apply to rotation rate.

Variables.Name: MaxLifetime
Variables.Description: The maximum lifetime of particles in this emitter.

Variables.Name: MaxParticleCount
Variables.Description: The maximum number of particles expected for this emitter.

Variables.Name: ScreenAlignment
Variables.Description: The method for aligning the particle based on the camera.

Variables.Name: LockAxisFlag
Variables.Description: The method for locking the particles to a particular axis.

Variables.Name: bEnableCollision
Variables.Description: If true, collisions are enabled for this emitter.

Variables.Name: bRemoveHMDRoll
Variables.Description: If true, removes the HMD view roll (e.g. in VR)

Variables.Name: MinFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_Square

Variables.Name: MaxFacingCameraBlendDistance
Variables.Description: The distance at which PSA_FacingCameraDistanceBlend	is fully PSA_FacingCameraPosition

Variables.Name: DynamicColor
Variables.Description: Dynamic color scale from the ColorOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicAlpha
Variables.Description: Dynamic alpha scale from the ColorOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicColorScale
Variables.Description: Dynamic color scale from the ColorScaleOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicAlphaScale
Variables.Description: Dynamic alpha scale from the ColorScaleOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicColorHDR
Variables.Description: Dynamic color scale from the ColorOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicAlphaHDR
Variables.Description: Dynamic alpha scale from the ColorOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicColorScaleHDR
Variables.Description: Dynamic color scale from the ColorScaleOverLife module.

Variables.Name: DynamicAlphaScaleHDR
Variables.Description: Dynamic alpha scale from the ColorScaleOverLife module.
